dilution_control.label: Dilution Control

chart_zones.mos_note: Margin of safety present — price near or below speculative fair value during accumulation (deep bear) phase.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 5.2/10 and survivability 60.0%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.method_explanation: This token is classified as a Cash-Flow Protocol — meaning it is a blockchain or decentralised finance (DeFi) protocol that earns real fee revenue from people using it, similar to how a business earns revenue. We use three methods to estimate its fair value. Network Activity (NVT) looks at how much trading volume flows through the network relative to its market cap — think of it like checking how busy a toll road is compared to what it costs to build. Fee/MC Multiple compares the total market cap to annual fee revenue, similar to a Price/Sales ratio for stocks — a lower ratio means you are paying less for each dollar of revenue the protocol earns. Rank Benchmark uses the historical relationship between a token's market cap rank and its price to anchor the estimate. The Speculative Fair Value shown is the average of whichever methods produced a reasonable result for this token.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: DeFiLlama has no fee data for this token. This typically means the protocol does not generate trackable on-chain fees, or its fee reporting is not yet indexed. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Only 2 methods contributed to the median. More data sources (DeFiLlama fee history) would improve confidence in this estimate. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

bull_points: Multi-year on-chain fee data confirms the protocol has generated real revenue across both bull and bear market cycles
Over 99% of the maximum supply is already in circulation — future dilution risk is minimal for long-term holders
Continued development activity and ecosystem growth support a constructive long-term view
bear_points: Competitive intensity in the Cash-Flow Protocol category may erode VeChain's position over time
Technology or regulatory disruption risk cannot be ruled out over a 3-5 year horizon
Long-term execution risk remains a key variable for any crypto investment

forecast_meta.method_explanation: This token is classified as a Cash-Flow Protocol — meaning it is a blockchain or decentralised finance (DeFi) protocol that earns real fee revenue from people using it, similar to how a business earns revenue. We use three methods to estimate its fair value. Network Activity (NVT) looks at how much trading volume flows through the network relative to its market cap — think of it like checking how busy a toll road is compared to what it costs to build. forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Network Activity (NVT) treats 24h trading volume as a proxy for on-chain utility — it fires when volume is available and the resulting IV falls within 0.1x–10x of current price. Metcalfe Network Value is shown in the breakdown chart without contributing to the median: the implied IV is below 10% of current price, indicating the token is trading at a significant premium to its network activity level. Dilution Adjustment penalises the large gap between circulating and fully-diluted supply — future token unlocks are expected to create selling pressure. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

forecast_meta.method_explanation: This token is classified as a Cash-Flow Protocol — meaning it is a blockchain or decentralised finance (DeFi) protocol that earns real fee revenue from people using it, similar to how a business earns revenue. We use three methods to estimate its fair value. Network Activity (NVT) looks at how much trading volume flows through the network relative to its market cap — think of it like checking how busy a toll road is compared to what it costs to build. Fee/MC Multiple compares the total market cap to annual fee revenue, similar to a Price/Sales ratio for stocks — a lower ratio means you are paying less for each dollar of revenue the protocol earns. Rank Benchmark uses the historical relationship between a token's market cap rank and its price to anchor the estimate. The Speculative Fair Value shown is the average of whichever methods produced a reasonable result for this token.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Up to 7 methods are available — Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, Holder Revenue, Metcalfe Network Value, Network Activity (NVT), Rank Benchmark, and Dilution Adjustment. Protocol Fee DCF, Fee/MC Multiple, and Holder Revenue are unavailable: this token has no DeFiLlama fee tracking. Valuation relies entirely on network activity and market positioning signals. Rank Benchmark anchors to the expected market cap for this token's rank tier, quality-adjusted and capped at 2× current price to avoid distortion. Dilution Adjustment did not fire: FDV/MC is within the acceptable range for this quality tier, so no dilution penalty was applied. Only 1 method contributed to the median — the valuation should be treated as a rough anchor, not a precise fair value. Methods producing values outside 0.01x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The mean of all qualifying per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.
